title: Typing Speed Test
description: Type a passage to measure your WPM, accuracy, and error count — see how you rank against the world average
viralHook: The average person types 41 WPM — what's your score?

fields.name: passage
fields.label: Type This Passage
fields.placeholder: Click 'Load Passage' to get your text, then type it here as fast as you can.
fields.readonlyPassage: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. Pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs. How vexingly quick daft zebras jump! The five boxing wizards jump quickly.
fields.hint: Passage: 'The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. Pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs. How vexingly quick daft zebras jump! The five boxing wizards jump quickly.'

fields.name: timeTaken
fields.label: Time Taken (seconds)
fields.hint: Use a stopwatch — start when you begin typing, stop when you finish

passages.Easy: The sun rose slowly over the hills. Birds began to sing in the trees. A gentle breeze moved through the grass.
passages.Medium: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. Pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs. How vexingly quick daft zebras jump! The five boxing wizards jump quickly.
passages.Hard: Cryptography is the practice of securing communications through mathematical algorithms. Modern encryption relies on computational complexity — problems easy to perform but extraordinarily difficult to reverse without the correct key.
passages.Code Snippet: function fibonacci(n) { if (n <= 1) return n; return fibonacci(n - 1) + fibonacci(n - 2); } console.log(fibonacci(10));

props.title: Your Typing Results
tips: 💡 Use all 10 fingers (touch typing) to break the 80 WPM barrier
💡 Focus on accuracy first — speed follows naturally
💡 Practice 15 minutes daily for measurable improvement in 2 weeks
💡 Keep your wrists elevated slightly above the keyboard
